_comment: Tiny purchase catalog for few-action robustness fixtures. Mirrors the cap-purchase-demo entity 'purchase_request' and its three real actions (submit/approve/reject), plus a synthetic create action because cap-demo exposes creation via REST rather than as a named action. When fixtures depend on a real, runtime-discoverable catalog, use catalogSource 'demo:purchase_management' which yields the same three real actions; this inline catalog adds 'create_purchase_request' so happy_path / param_extraction fixtures can test creation flows end-to-end.

actions.name: create_purchase_request
actions.label: Create purchase request
actions.description: Create a new draft purchase request that the user can later submit for approval

actions.name: submit_purchase_request
actions.label: Submit purchase request for approval
actions.description: Submit a draft purchase request for approval

actions.name: reject_purchase_request
actions.label: Reject purchase request
actions.description: Reject a pending purchase request with a stated reason
